headline: Emerson Electric Cybersecurity Move With OPSWAT Meets Strong Share Momentum
summary: Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) has entered a global reseller agreement with OPSWAT to integrate cybersecurity tools into its Ovation Automation Platform. The partnership focuses on protecting critical infrastructure operators, particularly in the power and water sectors. The collaboration expands Emerson Electric's operational technology security offerings for industrial clients facing rising cyber risks and tighter regulations. For investors tracking NYSE:EMR, this move adds a new layer to...
